basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC Pharmacist Exam Date 2026 Out at upsssc.gov.in - Check Full Exam Schedule
basic_details.short_information: UPSSSC Pharmacist Exam Date 2026: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released the notification for Pharmacist recruitment under Advertisement No. 01-Exam/2026. Candidates who have applied or are planning to apply for the Pharmacist posts can check the complete schedule below. The examination date is June 21, 2026 as per schedule on the official website. All eligible candidates are advised to complete their application process and prepare accordingly.

important_dates.raw: UPSSSC Pharmacist Exam Date 2026: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released the notification for Pharmacist recruitment under Advertisement No. 01-Exam/2026. Candidates who have applied or are planning to apply for the Pharmacist posts can check the complete schedule below. The examination date is June 21, 2026 as per schedule on the official website. All eligible candidates are advised to complete their application process and prepare accordingly. | TelegramJob alerts channel Join WhatsAppInstant updates Join InstagramDaily posts Follow Add FJA on As Preferred Source | Latest Update: UPSSSC has invited online applications for 560 Pharmacist (Bheshajik) posts (revised to 564 in some sources). The application window was open from 09 March 2026 to 29 March 2026. The exam date for UPSSSC Pharmacist Mains 2026 June 21, 2026. Candidates can check the official notification from the UPSSSC website. | Quick Link: Download UPSSSC Pharmacist Notification 2026 | Key Highlights - UPSSSC Pharmacist Exam Date 2026 Organization: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) Post Name: Pharmacist Exam Date: June 21, 2026 Official Website: https://upsssc.gov.in Admit Card Release: Before Exam (Expected 10-15 days prior)

faq.question: Q1. When is the UPSSSC Pharmacist exam scheduled for 2026?
faq.answer: The examination date is announced. It will be notified as per schedule on the official UPSSSC website.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the UPSSSC Pharmacist exam date notification?
faq.answer: You can download the notification from the official website https://upsssc.gov.in or check updates on reliable portals.

faq.question: Q3. When will the UPSSSC admit card be released?
faq.answer: The admit card is expected to be released 10-15 days before the examination date. Keep checking the official website regularly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the exam mode for UPSSSC Pharmacist 2026?
faq.answer: The examination mode will be mentioned in the detailed advertisement. It is expected to be offline or computer-based.
